title: CC-Emojis
description: This is not an official mod from PlayLegend.net! This mod adds an emoji menu for the emojis from the gamemode Cactus Clicker on PlayLegend.net.
body:
# cc-emojis

**This is not an official mod from [PlayLegend.net](https://playlegend.net/)**!

This mod adds an emoji menu for the emojis from the gamemode CC on [PlayLegend.net](https://playlegend.net/).

## Features
- Adds an emoji menu
- Emojis can be autocompleted from anywhere
- Autocomplete shows a preview of all emojis

## Compatibility
- Wokrs only on [PlayLegend.net](https://playlegend.net/)
- Works with Minecraft Fabric 1.21.7 Version or higher

## Screenshots

![Emoji Menu](https://i.imgur.com/05p7vLh.png)

![Emoji Preview](https://i.imgur.com/3zKmASb.png)
